content.json:
# Photo Album Telemetry
Use this workbook to monitor sessions, uploads, and deletes from Application Insights telemetry emitted by the app.

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(24h) and name in ('photo.session.activity', 'photo.session.ended')
| extend sessionDurationMs = todouble(customMeasurements['sessionDurationMs'])
| where isnotnull(sessionDurationMs)
| summarize AvgSessionMs = avg(sessionDurationMs), MaxSessionMs = max(sessionDurationMs) by bin(timestamp, 15m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Session Duration Trend

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(24h) and name in ('photo.upload.file', 'photo.upload.batch')
| extend result = tostring(customDimensions['result'])
| summarize Uploads = count(), Success = countif(result == 'success'), Failed = countif(result == 'failure') by bin(timestamp, 15m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Upload Success vs Failure

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(24h) and name == 'photo.delete'
| extend result = tostring(customDimensions['result'])
| summarize Deletes = count(), Success = countif(result == 'success'), Failed = countif(result == 'failure') by bin(timestamp, 15m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Delete Success vs Failure

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(24h) and name in ('photo.upload.file', 'photo.delete')
| extend durationMs = todouble(customMeasurements['durationMs'])
| where isnotnull(durationMs)
| summarize P50DurationMs = percentile(durationMs, 50), P95DurationMs = percentile(durationMs, 95) by name, bin(timestamp, 15m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Operation Latency (P50/P95)

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp > ago(24h) and name == 'photo.upload.file'
| extend fileType = tostring(customDimensions['mimeType'])
| summarize Count = count() by FileType = fileType
| order by Count desc
content.title: Top Uploaded File Types
